task_completion.description: Agent opens the restructuring memo to read the required changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer showing the contents of 'restructuring_memo.txt' on the desktop.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the new Business Unit in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo web interface showing 'Acme Corp Technology' in the Business Units list or a successful creation confirmation message.

task_completion.description: Agent reassigns Engineering and Data Science departments to the new Business Unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo Departments list or edit screen showing 'Engineering' and 'Data Science' associated with the 'Acme Corp Technology' Business Unit.

task_completion.description: Agent reassigns DevOps & Infrastructure and Quality Assurance departments to the new Business Unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo Departments list or edit screen showing 'DevOps & Infrastructure' and 'Quality Assurance' associated with the 'Acme Corp Technology' Business Unit.

task_completion.description: Agent leaves the HQ departments untouched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo Departments list showing departments like 'Sales', 'Marketing', 'Finance & Accounting', or 'Human Resources' associated with their original Business Unit (NOT 'Acme Corp Technology').

integrity.description: Agent used the Sentrifugo web GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the Sentrifugo web interface (e.g., Organization > Business Units/Departments) rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Sentrifugo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the local Sentrifugo URL and the interface matches the Sentrifugo HRMS, not a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open in the screenshots showing the final state of the Business Units and Departments.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected new Business Unit is 'Acme Corp Technology'. The departments to be transferred to this new BU are: 'Engineering', 'Data Science', 'DevOps & Infrastructure', and 'Quality Assurance'. The departments that must remain untouched are: 'Sales', 'Marketing', 'Finance & Accounting', 'Human Resources', 'Customer Support', and 'Product Development'.
